figures.name: purity_progression
figures.label: fig:purity_progression
figures.caption: Purity progression across the five refinery stages from ore (9K) to nine-nines certification.
figures.visual_encoding: bars encode stage gain; line encodes cumulative purity; inset encodes nines gained

figures.name: karat_grading
figures.label: fig:karat_grading
figures.caption: Gold karat grading scale (9K–24K + nine-nines) with refinery stage markers.
figures.visual_encoding: horizontal threshold bands with refinery-stage markers

figures.name: token_density
figures.label: fig:token_density
figures.caption: Mega-madlib token distribution across manuscript sections and lexicon categories.
figures.visual_encoding: ordered bars encode token counts by section and lexicon category

figures.name: provenance_sankey
figures.label: fig:provenance_sankey
figures.caption: Provenance trace: ore → stages → certification purity flow.
figures.visual_encoding: directed stage graph with edge widths proportional to purity gain

figures.name: purity_claim_scatter
figures.label: fig:purity_claim_scatter
figures.caption: Stage purity plotted against the single project-level claim-support assay.
figures.visual_encoding: x positions encode stage output purity; the shared y position encodes the project-level claim-support rate

figures.name: token_heatmap
figures.label: fig:token_heatmap
figures.caption: Token selection heatmap: seed × category → selected index.
figures.visual_encoding: heatmap cells encode deterministic selected inventory index across seeds

figures.name: seed_sensitivity
figures.label: fig:seed_sensitivity
figures.caption: Seed-sensitivity distribution and the declared sample-size precision ladder for token-plan agreement.
figures.visual_encoding: histogram encodes seed-level token agreement; line encodes the distribution-free precision radius by sample size

figures.name: integrity_gate_matrix
figures.label: fig:integrity_gate_matrix
figures.caption: Integrity-gate matrix linking audit rules to tests, manuscript surfaces, and generated artifacts.
figures.visual_encoding: categorical matrix encodes missing, partial, and full coverage by gate surface

figures.name: formalism_traceability
figures.label: fig:formalism_traceability
figures.caption: Formalism traceability from source-owned equation identifiers to source evidence.
figures.visual_encoding: bipartite graph links formalisms to equation labels and source owners

figures.name: implementation_circuit
figures.label: fig:implementation_circuit
figures.caption: Implementation circuit from config-owned ore through generated manuscript artifacts and validation feedback.
figures.visual_encoding: directed graph encodes source, generated, validation, and publication layers

figures.name: claim_evidence_assay
figures.label: fig:claim_evidence_assay
figures.caption: Claim-evidence assay showing supported contribution claims, evidence surfaces, and boundary classifications.
figures.visual_encoding: support bars plus claim to evidence to boundary graph topology

figures.name: integrity_risk_matrix
figures.label: fig:integrity_risk_matrix
figures.caption: Scientific-integrity risk matrix plotting severity, detectability, residual risk, and owning evidence surface.
figures.visual_encoding: scatter positions encode severity and detectability; marker size encodes residual risk; color encodes source tier

figures.name: evidence_tier_ladder
figures.label: fig:evidence_tier_ladder
figures.caption: Evidence-tier ladder summarizing source tiers available to the shared template evidence registry.
figures.visual_encoding: ordered horizontal bars encode counts and percentages by evidence source tier
